title: StatusData
description:
`status` result — the one orientation read: enrollment, sign-in, follow counts, per-agent
trigger arm state, and the binary version. Computed ENTIRELY from local state (no network).
**INFERRED** (additive-only).

enrolled.description: Whether this install is enrolled with a plane (the enrollment doc exists).

followed_skills.description:
Skills this install currently follows (excluding per-device exclusions and unfollowed
copies).

items.description:
The resolved TRUST-RAIL table for the CURRENT directory: every bundle the local manifests
covering it ask for, nearest-first deduped, each with its one source line and state.
**Additive.**

pending_offers.description:
First-receive offers awaiting consent (a followed skill whose bytes never landed here).
Absent = not cheaply knowable from local state.

server.description: The pinned plane base URL, when enrolled.

sessions.description:
This installation's SESSIONS — one per logged-into workspace (the session model; empty =
logged into nothing). **Additive.**

signed_in.description: Whether the device credential is stored (the signed-in state).

triggers.description:
Per-agent auto-update trigger state, probed READ-ONLY over the detected agents (nothing is
armed or repaired by `status`).

workspaces.description: The joined workspaces (empty when never enrolled).

StatusItem.description:
One resolved line of the trust rail. Every "why does this agent have X?" is answered by
`source` (which manifest line asked for it); every "why doesn't it?" by `state`. **INFERRED**
(additive-only).

scope.description:
Where the bytes belong: `"project"` (this project's harness dirs) or `"person"` (the home
dirs).

shadows.description: Broader manifests this line shadows (their labels) — rendered, never acted on.

source.description:
ONE source line: the manifest that asked for it (`<dir>/topos.toml` or
`~/.topos/topos.toml`).

version.description: The applied version (64-hex), when one is applied locally.

StatusItemState.description: A trust-rail line's state. **INFERRED value set** (additive).

oneOf.description: The bytes are applied and current against the last-known target.
A newer target is known than what is applied — the next `update` lands it.
Local edits sit ahead of the applied version (a draft).

Referenced here but NOT deliverable with your current access — phrased from LOCAL
knowledge only (no session for its workspace); never from server confirmation.
The session that would deliver it is pending an owner's approval.
Not yet applied (never delivered here), or not determinable offline.

StatusSession.description:
One session in a [`StatusData`] — this installation logged into one workspace. **INFERRED**
(additive-only).

host.description: The server host the workspace lives on (the manifest grammar's host half).

name.description: The ADDRESS name (what you logged in by).

session_status.description:
The session's status, when it is NOT plainly active: `"pending"` (awaiting an owner's
approval — delivery starts automatically once approved) or `"ended"` (revoked or gone —
`topos login <address>` starts a fresh one). Absent = active.

StatusTrigger.description:
One detected agent's auto-update trigger presence in a [`StatusData`] — a read-only probe of
the same artifact the arming sweep manages. **INFERRED** (additive-only).

armed.description:
Provable presence of the topos trigger artifact right now. Absent = unknowable without a
live probe `status` refuses to run (a scheduler that must be dialed to answer).

note.description: A short honesty note (e.g. why `armed` is unknown), when one is needed.

link_status.description:
This device's link to the workspace, when it is NOT plainly active: `"pending"` (awaiting an
owner's approval — delivery starts automatically once approved) or `"ended"` (the link was
severed or never approved — `topos follow <address>` relinks). Absent = active. **Additive.**

name.description: The ADDRESS name (what you joined by).
